examples: Groom a pretender (for lack of a better word), build a coalition, and wait for your CEO to screw up, which he will if he is a short-termer. Then pounce.
Sponsored by American money. Gotta love it. The Chinese at least have a goal in space while we wallow in our own stupidity aimless thanks to our one termer.
W. Bush, the one-termer who succeeded him, and that selfsame Chester Arthur.
Here we can distinguish between, say, Jimmy Carter, a one-termer expelled by the voters, and Reagan, a two-term president succeeded by his own vice president.
Consider Dwight Eisenhower, initially pegged by historians as a mediocre two-termer.
